code:
data Bucket
  mut tokens: Int
end

fn allow(_ b: Bucket) -> Bool
  mut bucket = b
  if bucket.tokens >= 1
    bucket.tokens = bucket.tokens - 1
    true
  else
    false
  end
end

fn step(_ b: Bucket) -> Unit
  if allow(b)
    println("ALLOW")
  else
    println("DENY")
  end
end

let bucket = Bucket(tokens: 3)
step(bucket)
step(bucket)
step(bucket)
step(bucket)
step(bucket)
